query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `infrastructureAssets` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `externalRef` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `label` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `assetType` enum('Tower','Fibre Route','PoP') NOT NULL,
  `provider` varchar(255),
  `latitude` decimal(10,8) NOT NULL,
  `longitude` decimal(11,8) NOT NULL,
  `endLatitude` decimal(10,8),
  `endLongitude` decimal(11,8),
  `description` text,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  `verificationStatus` enum('Known','Candidate','Field Verified') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Candidate',
  `region` varchar(255),
  `source` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CTTX infrastructure intelligence',
  `active` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `infrastructureAssets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `infrastructureAssets_externalRef_unique` UNIQUE(`externalRef`)
);
INSERT INTO `infrastructureAssets` (`externalRef`, `label`, `assetType`, `provider`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `endLatitude`, `endLongitude`, `description`, `confidence`, `verificationStatus`, `region`, `source`, `active`) VALUES
('ec-kwandwe-vodacom-ridge', 'Vodacom Ridge High Site', 'Tower', 'Vodacom', -33.14500000, 26.55800000, NULL, NULL, 'Known ridge tower candidate for LTE failover, microwave survey, and high-site validation near Kwandwe.', 86, 'Known', 'Eastern Cape / Grahamstown corridor', 'CTTX seed intelligence', 1),
('ec-kwandwe-tfa-south-route', 'TFA Southern Fibre Route', 'Fibre Route', 'TFA', -33.23800000, 26.51400000, -33.25200000, 26.60500000, 'Candidate fibre route and handoff corridor south of the reserve requiring provider confirmation.', 72, 'Candidate', 'Eastern Cape / Grahamstown corridor', 'CTTX seed intelligence', 1),
('ec-grahamstown-regional-pop', 'Grahamstown Regional PoP', 'PoP', 'CTTX partner network', -33.31100000, 26.52500000, NULL, NULL, 'Regional point-of-presence reference for backhaul feasibility and handoff planning.', 78, 'Candidate', 'Eastern Cape / Grahamstown corridor', 'CTTX seed intelligence', 1),
('ec-kwandwe-mtn-north-highsite', 'MTN Northern High Site', 'Tower', 'MTN', -33.09450000, 26.47020000, NULL, NULL, 'Candidate northern high-site option for diversity modelling and obstruction checks.', 69, 'Candidate', 'Eastern Cape / Grahamstown corridor', 'CTTX seed intelligence', 1),
('ec-kwandwe-reserve-ops-pop', 'Reserve Operations Micro-PoP', 'PoP', 'CTTX field design', -33.20180000, 26.50160000, NULL, NULL, 'Field-verified internal aggregation candidate for lodge, gate, CCTV, and ranger telemetry handoff.', 92, 'Field Verified', 'Eastern Cape / Grahamstown corridor', 'CTTX seed intelligence', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  `label` = VALUES(`label`),
  `assetType` = VALUES(`assetType`),
  `provider` = VALUES(`provider`),
  `latitude` = VALUES(`latitude`),
  `longitude` = VALUES(`longitude`),
  `endLatitude` = VALUES(`endLatitude`),
  `endLongitude` = VALUES(`endLongitude`),
  `description` = VALUES(`description`),
  `confidence` = VALUES(`confidence`),
  `verificationStatus` = VALUES(`verificationStatus`),
  `region` = VALUES(`region`),
  `source` = VALUES(`source`),
  `active` = VALUES(`active`);
